title: Section Instructors
description: Information about instructors assigned to sections in academic capacities.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the section instructor.

instructor.title: Instructor
instructor.description: The person assigned as an instructor to the section.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructor.

section.title: Section
section.description: The section to which the instructor is assigned.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Section.

instructionalEvents.title: Instructional Events
instructionalEvents.description: The instructional events associated with the assignment of the instructor to the section, if applicable.

items.title: Instructional Events
items.description: The instructional events associated with the assignment of the instructor to the section, if applicable.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Events.

instructionalMethod.title: Instructional Method
instructionalMethod.description: The method, style, or format of instruction associated with the instructor's involvement with the section (for example, 'Lecture', 'Lab').

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Instructional Method.

instructorRole.title: Instructor Role
instructorRole.description: An indication whether the instructor is identified as the primary instructor for the section.

workLoad.title: Work Load
workLoad.description: The amount of work attributed to the instructor for the assignment.

responsibilityPercentage.title: Responsibility Percentage
responsibilityPercentage.description: The percentage of the total responsibility for managing the instructional method's activities attributed to the instructor for the assignment.

workStartOn.title: Work Start On
workStartOn.description: The first date associated with the instructor's assignment.

workEndOn.title: Work End On
workEndOn.description: The last date associated with the instructor's assignment.
